Host Grotesk.usage: all headings (wordmark, hero H1, section H2/H3, card titles)
Host Grotesk.fix: In apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx: change Host_Grotesk variable to '--font-heading'. In globals.css the @theme already maps --font-heading: var(--font-heading) so the Tailwind utility font-heading will pick up Host Grotesk.

DM Sans.usage: all body, subtext, display, breadcrumb, eyebrow, nav links, CTA, meta
DM Sans.target_wiring: --font-sans (Tailwind font-sans class; also the html base font via globals.css `html { @apply font-sans }`)
DM Sans.fix: In apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx: change DM_Sans variable to '--font-sans'.

sequential_build_order: 1. Fix font wiring in apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx (swap Host Grotesk / DM Sans variables; drop Playfair Display + Geist Mono).
2. Replace app/layout.tsx Header import with SiteHeader from components/site-header.tsx; align SiteHeader nav-link labels to Figma ('About Bodhi' with caret).
3. Build MarketingHero section with both h1 styles + 2 height variants.
5. Build CoursesGrid and ArticlesGrid section wrappers (just laying out ProgramCard arrays).
6. Wire 7 page routes; each renders SiteHeader → MarketingHero(...page props) → [optional FilterPillBar] → CoursesGrid|ArticlesGrid → SiteFooter.
7. Visual QA against per-page Figma screenshots; iterate copy + asset substitutions.
